meta.title: Open-Source AI Tools, Automation Blueprints & Document Intelligence | Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Explore Amphibian Labs open-source projects, including DocIQ, an AI document intelligence engine for healthcare document processing, OCR, structured extraction, and FHIR R4-compatible output.

hero.title: Open source
hero.subtitle: Production-grade tools, templates, and blueprints - built in the open. Useful technology should not only belong to organisations with enterprise budgets.

spotlight.label: Flagship project
spotlight.title: DocIQ
spotlight.tagline: AI document intelligence engine for healthcare
spotlight.description: Open-source AI backend that reads, classifies, extracts (rule-based + LLM), validates, and structures data from medical documents. Designed for real-world clinical workflows where documents arrive as native PDFs, scanned images, inconsistent layouts, or mixed-language text.

why.title: Why open source?
why.body: Open source creates transparency. For AI systems, especially in document processing and healthcare-adjacent workflows, trust matters. Teams should be able to inspect how a system works, understand its limits, and adapt it to their operational reality.

error.title: Could not load repositories
error.body: GitHub API is temporarily unavailable. You can browse all repositories directly on GitHub.

cta.title: Get involved
cta.body: Explore the repositories, use the tools, open an issue, or contribute improvements. Good tools get better when people can see them.
